message:
fix(diagnostics): include source_path in UNIQUE constraint violation warning

The tracing::warn! in franken_insert_conversation_or_get_existing now logs
conv.source_path so operators can identify the exact file that triggered the
duplicate (source_id, agent_id, external_id) conflict, rather than having to
correlate the abstract key tuple back to a file manually.

Closes #141

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
